title: New Script
readAloud:
A sound echoes through the storm unlike anything you've ever heard before.

The sound of a ship finally giving up.

The deck splits beneath your feet.

The world becomes water.
notes:
Threshold Descriptions
30 HP-Crew become visibly worried.
20 HP-Water enters below deck.
10 HP-Captain Thorne orders everyone above deck.
5 HP-The Sea's Fury is dying.
